name: io.github.Servosity/ninjaone-mcp
title: NinjaOne MCP
description: Every NinjaOne report, plus a local store that answers fleet-wide questions no single API call can

environmentVariables.name: NINJAONE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Set the NINJAONE_CLIENT_ID credential for the NinjaOne MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: NINJAONE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Set the NINJAONE_CLIENT_SECRET credential for the NinjaOne MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: NINJAONE_OAUTH_SCOPE
environmentVariables.description: Set the NINJAONE_OAUTH_SCOPE credential for the NinjaOne MCP server.
